currency_rules.normalization_formula: total_copper = copper + 10*silver + 100*gold + 1000*platinum; rebuild as platinum, gold, silver, copper so copper/silver/gold are each 0-9.

main_doability_needs: bed-level or seated options by default
oxygen/breathing, pain, vertigo, fatigue, mobility, and recovery time respected
ADHD/autism supports: transitions, low-stimulation starts, tiny visible steps
partial completion and stopping before a crash count as success
no shame, no body blame, no pressure to push through pain or dysphoria
ADHD transition support before task demands
caregiver burnout recovery treated as care, not avoidance
protected rest, boundaries, decompression, sensory needs, and people-pleasing checks
no assumption that Jasper has unlimited caregiver capacity

household_rules: no hour block may hold more than two tasks/tools
skills may be used as one-breath or one-field versions
survival days load critical care first and skip optional worksheets
rest, boundaries, decompression, and asking for help count as care
skills are for support, not grades

start_the_day_rule: Only daily records are eligible for automatic Start the Day rotation. Weekly/monthly/yearly records may be manually or expanded-day scheduled. Every hour block remains capped at two items.

records.title: Common Addictions In case you thought you had no addictions, here is a list. You are addicted when you are unable to stop a behavior pattern or use of substances, despite negative consequences and despite your best efforts to stop.

records.title: Body Scan Meditation Step by Step Sit on a chair, or lie on your back on the floor with legs uncrossed. Put your arms in a comfortable position by your side, on your abdomen, or (if sitting) put them on your thighs palms up. Open your eyes partially to let light in. If you are lying on the floor, put a cushion under your knees if need
